🦿 ArthroplastyREF: MRL-HNK-003

Destiknee Hinge Femoral Components

Destiknee · Knee Femoral Components

Hinge femoral component designed for complex knee reconstructions. Accommodates stem extensions and optional distal and posterior condylar augmentation blocks for comprehensive bone defect management.

Material_UNSPECIFIED
Frequently Asked Questions

Hinge femoral component designed for complex knee reconstructions. Accommodates stem extensions and optional distal and posterior condylar augmentation blocks for comprehensive bone defect management.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Destiknee Hinge Femoral Components, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Destiknee Hinge Femoral Components is constructed using _UNSPECIFIED, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
